name: Crowne Plaza Bandung By IHG
detail: It was a last minute trip. So my wife and I decided to book a trip to Bandung, as we've never been there before. Weather was perfect. Shopping nothing to shout about as most of the things offered are imitations. Great POLO RL store which offered great deals at Jalan Braga. About the hotel. I've visited Indonesia many times before for work and leisure, have stayed in many nice hotels in Indonesia. To my surprise, services and greetings by Staff at Crowne Plaza Bandung is top notch compared to all the years of my travelling. Keep it up guys! Rooms, great size. Arrived and checked into a high floor 1702. Room was perfectly layed out, but found out a bad stench coming from the toilet. Was bearable when you close the toilet door, but when you enter the toilet......the smell is just unbearable. We stayed a night, and filed a complain the following day. Was transferred to room 1210. Was upgraded to a much bigger room, minus the toilet stench. To our surprise, was given a personal card for an apology accompanied by a serving of their cakes. Classy move and great job by the team!

name: Kimaya Braga Bandung by Harris
detail: And every detail was thoughtfully taken care of.
area: Bandung City Center,Bandung - View on map

name: The Luxton Hotel
detail: I had a wonderful stay at The Luxton. The breakfast was excellent. The room is very clean n comfortable. My kids enjoyed swimming eventhough it rained evryday bec of the indoor swimming pool. My kids love the kids club. The only thing that need improvement is the parking area which is too small. But tht's not a big problem coz thy provide free vallet parking which is very helpful. This will be one of my favourite hotel in Bandung.

name: JIRO Hotel
detail: The hotel and rooms are nicely decorated and very stylish.

name: YELLO Hotel Paskal Bandung
detail: The Yellow Hotel Paskal in Bandung is located on top of The Paskal 23 Mall, at Paskal Hyper Square offering a great location in the City Centre and on top of a modern Shopping Mall. Surrounded by local outside & inside food courts and many other great Restaurants including international brand name shops and top notch Cinema as well as Children’s playground. Situated in a strategic location close to the Bandung main railway station and less than three kilometres from the International Husein Sastranegara Airport (Bandung) makes it a great place to stay for travellers with a tight itinerary. The hotel itself is decorated and furnished in clean modern and young hip style, suited for families with children, young couples and singles. Offering a game corner, outside swimming pool it keeps young and old entertained during the day and night time. Needless to say, I recommend to stay here as it offers great value for service in a clean and fun like environment making your stay enjoyable
area: Bandung City Center,Bandung - View on map

name: Hilton Bandung
detail: Local travelers who rarely frequent Bandung, especially those from Jakarta, would be pleasantly surprised when they stay at Hilton Bandung. Set with lower expectations of how nice 5-star hotels in Bandung would fare compared to the ones in Jakarta, these travelers would be quite awed with Hilton Bandung's modern and sophisticated design that is done flawlessly without forgoing comfort. So if you're looking for a modernly aesthetic, comfortable hotel in Bandung, Hilton Bandung can be your best bet.

name: Hotel O Cihampelas Near Ciwalk Formerly D'River Guest House
detail: The staff are nice and clean, proper hotel room.

name: Collection O Hotel Pasar Baru Heritage
detail: I love that it's cheap! perfect for my short stay in Bandung
area: Bandung City Center,Bandung - View on map

name: de Braga, ARTOTEL Curated
detail: I had five nights in this hotel. This hotel is one of newest hotel in bandung. The location is near from train station and braga street. When I go to tourist attractions, it is very nice place for saving time. Breakfast is not bad. When I consider the price itself, it is best choice.
area: Bandung City Center,Bandung - View on map

name: Hotel Mercure Bandung City Centre
detail: Mercure Bandung City Centre is a new and hip place to stay in. It wasn't too expensive but I don't consider it very cheap either. But since it is new, I didn't mind paying the amount that I did. The decor of the hotel is modern and very pleasant. The room was quite spacious, and the bed very comfortable. I also spent considerable time at the pool, which was not very big but sufficient to do some laps. The deck chairs did not have cushions so they tend to get a little hot under the sun but you could get a towel and use that to lay on. When it got too hot, the couch and chairs in the shade were very comfortable. I most enjoyed the service provided by the staff, who were always friendly and helpful! And I'm not only talking about people at the front desk. The servers in the restaurant were awesome, so were the guys at the pool, and the housekeeping staff! However, because it is a new hotel, it has the expected teething problems. The most jarring problem that stood out to me was the breakfast in the hotel cafe. For 4 mornings, I only enjoyed the congee and the egg station, because they were the only hot food available (there was also soto in a boiling pot but I did not eat that). The other food, like the fried noodles, fried rice, vegetables etc that were in food warmers were cold because the heaters were not turned on. That defeats the purpose of putting the food in the warmers... I had dinner in the restaurant at the first night as well and the food took a very long time to come as well. But the staff were so nice that I didn't mind the wait too much. Continue to improve, Mercure Bandung City Centre! I might come back again.
area: Bandung City Center,Bandung - View on map
